title: Market Pulse Pro
author: NPR21
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Market Pulse Pro by NPR21.
DESCRIPTION MarketPulse Pro A multi-indicator trend confirmation overlay that fuses 16 technical conditions into a single Agreement Level score (0–16).

Built on the foundation of Christopher84's Confirmation Candles concept and significantly enhanced with four original systems: a 3-Tier Momentum Filter, Higher Timeframe Trend Alignment, Adaptive Confirmation Factor, and ATR-based TP/SL levels.

Every enhancement is independently togglable, so traders can run the core confirmation engine … DESCRIPTION MarketPulse Pro A multi-indicator trend confirmation overlay that fuses 16 technical conditions into a single Agreement Level score (0–16).
